+    @ViewBuilder
+    private func pageView(for pageIndex: Int) -> some View {
+        switch pageIndex {
+        case 0:
+            self.welcomePage()
+        case 1:
+            self.connectionPage()
+        case 2:
+            self.anthropicAuthPage()
+        case 3:
+            self.identityPage()
+        case 4:
+            self.gatewayPage()
+        case 5:
+            self.permissionsPage()
+        case 6:
+            self.cliPage()
+        case 7:
+            self.workspacePage()
+        case 8:
+            self.whatsappPage()
+        case 9:
+            self.readyPage()
+        default:
+            EmptyView()
+        }
+    }
+
